runtime_proof.note: Pure TypeScript enforcement — PendingApproval and ApprovalRecord are static values. No live DB required. Approval decisions are deterministic and replay-safe.
queries: DUAL_AUTH_ACTIONS includes all 6 required governed actions
createPendingApproval produces frozen record with correct TTL
completeApproval succeeds with different operator (alice + bob)
completeApproval after TTL expiry throws DualAuthViolationError (ADVERSARIAL)
completeApproval after expiry on promotion:override throws DualAuthViolationError (ADVERSARIAL)
isDualAuthExpired returns true past TTL, false within TTL
replayApprovalChain is deterministic — same inputs produce equal ApprovalRecord
ApprovalRecord is frozen — mutations throw TypeError in strict mode

row_counts.note: No database tables modified — dual-auth enforcement is pure TypeScript with no DB dependency.

receipts.note: Pure TypeScript enforcement — PendingApproval and ApprovalRecord are values; no Supabase interaction
receipts.gap_closed: Gap #16 — dual authorization was convention only; now mechanically enforced
